hooks.prompt: If significant code was written or modified during this task (new files created, substantial edits to existing files, or a feature implementation), suggest to the user that they run `/deslop:scan <path>` to check code quality. Keep the suggestion brief and natural, like: 'Since we wrote a fair amount of code, you might want to run `/deslop:scan <path>` to check the quality score.' If only minor changes were made (config tweaks, small fixes, documentation), do NOT suggest a scan.
